response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified 'Metropolitan Museum' by Taeko Onuki and 'Hyokkori Hyoutan-jima' through on-screen text and audio.
2. Searched for '"メトロポリタン美術館" 大貫妙子 Japanese and English lyrics' and '"ひょっこりひょうたん島" Japanese and English lyrics'.
3. Successfully retrieved original and translated lyrics for both.
4. Mapped scenes based on song starts, ends, and the transitional skit.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual puppet performance, primarily starring Inugami Korone, with appearances by Nekomata Okayu, Ookami Mio, and Shirakami Fubuki. It consists of two songs, "Metropolitan Museum" and "Hyokkori Hyoutan-jima," separated by a skit on a ship.

scenes.description: Inugami Korone performs 'Metropolitan Museum' in a museum-themed setting. Text indicates song title.
scenes.song_title: メトロポリタン美術館 (Metropolitan Museum)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
大理石の 台の上で
天使の像 ささやいた
夜になると ここは冷える
君の服を 貸してくれる？
タイムトラベルは 楽し
メトロポリタン ミュージアム
赤い靴下で よければ
かたっぽあげる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
On a marble pedestal
A statue of an angel whispered
When night comes, it gets cold here
Will you lend me your clothes?
Traveling in time is fun
Metropolitan Museum
If red socks are okay
I'll give you one

scenes.description: Skit featuring puppet characters on a ship in the ocean.
Inugami Korone, Nekomata Okayu, Ookami Mio, and Shirakami Fubuki perform 'Hyokkori Hyoutan-jima' on a ship. Text indicates song title.
scenes.song_title: ひょっこりひょうたん島 (Hyokkori Hyoutan-jima)
scenes.performer_in_video: Inugami Korone, Nekomata Okayu, Ookami Mio, Shirakami Fubuki
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
波をちゃぷちゃぷ ちゃぷちゃぷ かきわけて
(ちゃぷ ちゃぷ ちゃぷ)
雲をすいすい すいすい 追い抜いて
(すい すい すい)
ひょうたん島は どこへ行く
ぼくらを乗せて どこへ行く
丸い地球の 水平線に
何かがきっと 待っている
くるしいことも あるだろさ
かなしいことも あるだろさ
だけど ぼくらは くじけない
泣くのは いやだ 笑っちゃお
進め ひょっこりひょうたん島
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Splashing, splashing, splashing, splashing through the waves
(Splash, splash, splash)
Sailing smoothly, smoothly past the clouds
(Smooth, smooth, smooth)
Where is Hyoutan-jima going?
Where is it taking us?
On the horizon of the round Earth
Something is surely waiting
There must be painful things
There must be sad things
But we will not give up
I hate crying, so let's laugh
Proceed, Hyoutan-jima
